targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  total_score
FROM score_runs
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  CASE status
    WHEN 'DEPLOY' THEN 2
    WHEN 'CAUTION' THEN 1
    WHEN 'HOLD' THEN 0
    ELSE -1
  END AS status_value
FROM score_runs
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  CASE WHEN deploy_allowed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS deploy_allowed
FROM score_runs
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - calculated_at)) / 60 AS minutes_since_update
FROM score_runs
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  calculated_at,
  summary
FROM score_runs
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  calculated_at AS "time",
  status
FROM score_runs
ORDER BY calculated_at;

SELECT 
  CASE status
    WHEN 'DEPLOY' THEN 2
    WHEN 'CAUTION' THEN 1
    WHEN 'HOLD' THEN 0
    ELSE -1
  END AS status_value
FROM score_runs
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  AVG(total_score) AS avg_score
FROM score_runs
WHERE calculated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour';

SELECT
  calculated_at,
  status,
  deploy_allowed,
  total_score
FROM score_runs
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT
  component_name,
  component_score,
  weight,
  reason
FROM score_components
WHERE score_run_id = (
  SELECT id
  FROM score_runs
  ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY component_name;

SELECT
  calculated_at AS "time",
  total_score
FROM score_runs
ORDER BY calculated_at;

SELECT
  sc.component_name,
  sc.component_score
FROM score_components sc
JOIN score_runs sr ON sr.id = sc.score_run_id
WHERE sr.id = (
  SELECT id
  FROM score_runs
  ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY sc.component_score ASC;

SELECT
  sc.component_name,
  sc.weight,
  sc.component_score
FROM score_components sc
JOIN score_runs sr ON sr.id = sc.score_run_id
WHERE sr.id = (
  SELECT id
  FROM score_runs
  ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY sc.weight DESC;

SELECT
  sc.component_name,
  sc.component_score,
  sc.reason
FROM score_components sc
JOIN score_runs sr ON sr.id = sc.score_run_id
WHERE sr.id = (
  SELECT id
  FROM score_runs
  ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY sc.component_score ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT
  sr.calculated_at AS "time",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sc.component_name = 'node_headroom' THEN sc.component_score END) AS node_headroom,
  MAX(CASE WHEN sc.component_name = 'restart_pressure' THEN sc.component_score END) AS restart_pressure,
  MAX(CASE WHEN sc.component_name = 'image_pull_health' THEN sc.component_score END) AS image_pull_health,
  MAX(CASE WHEN sc.component_name = 'startup_latency' THEN sc.component_score END) AS startup_latency,
  MAX(CASE WHEN sc.component_name = 'dependency_health' THEN sc.component_score END) AS dependency_health
FROM score_components sc
JOIN score_runs sr ON sr.id = sc.score_run_id
GROUP BY sr.calculated_at
ORDER BY sr.calculated_at;

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    sr.calculated_at,
    sc.component_name,
    sc.component_score,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY sr.id
      ORDER BY sc.component_score ASC
    ) AS rn
  FROM score_components sc
  JOIN score_runs sr ON sr.id = sc.score_run_id
)
SELECT
  calculated_at AS "time",
  component_score
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY calculated_at;

SELECT
  calculated_at,
  total_score,
  status,
  deploy_allowed,
  threshold,
  summary
FROM score_runs
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
